name: uipath-sites
description: Bootstrap plugin that routes UiPath coded-app requests away from normal Sites hosting and prepares the UiPath CLI workflow on first use.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap Sites into UiPath coded apps.
interface.longDescription: UiPath Sites teaches Codex to use Sites for frontend generation while bootstrapping the UiPath CLI, skills, login flow, local verification, and coded-app packaging/deployment.
defaultPrompt: @Sites build a UiPath coded app for Maestro.
@Sites create a coded app using uipath-typescript.
@Sites build, verify locally, and deploy with uip codedapp.
